cases.title: User-configured job alert stays work notification

email.subject: 8 new security roles match your job alert
email.body_text: You set up a job alert for security roles. Review new Lead Security Engineer and Staff Detection Engineer openings that match your preferences.
email.raw_email_content:
List-Id: LinkedIn Job Alerts <jobs.linkedin.com>
List-Unsubscribe: <mailto:unsubscribe@linkedin.com>

You set up a job alert for security roles.

analysis.human_summary: LinkedIn sent a configured job alert for security roles. No mailbox action is required unless you want to review the matching roles.

cases.title: Fraud education newsletter is not phishing

email.subject: How to spot tax refund scams this season
email.body_text: Your credit union shared fraud prevention tips explaining how to recognize tax refund scams. The article links to the normal education center and does not ask for credentials or payment.

analysis.human_summary: The credit union sent a fraud education newsletter. It is informational and does not request credentials or payment.

cases.title: Hide My Email delivery notice remains transactional

email.subject: Missed delivery attempt for order 4812
email.body_text: Narvar sent a missed delivery notice for an existing order with carrier tracking details and a reschedule link for the shipment.
email.raw_email_content:
X-ICLOUD-HME: Forwarded for alias abc123@icloud.com
DKIM-Signature: d=narvar.example

Missed delivery attempt for order 4812.

analysis.human_summary: Narvar sent a transactional missed-delivery notice for an existing order. The Hide My Email alias is context, not standalone spoofing evidence.

cases.title: Magic link auth flow is classified as magic_link

email.subject: Your sign-in link
email.body_text: Use this secure one-time sign-in link to access your Product account. The link expires in 15 minutes and was requested from your browser.

analysis.human_summary: Product sent a requested one-time sign-in link. Use it only if you initiated the login.
